notes: Stress axis: multi-file formatting failure (lint-react-001 dev case has 1 file; this has 2). Tests whether methods preserve BOTH file paths, not just the first. category mismatch justified: case.json uses the v1 schema's 'lint_error' (no 'formatting_failure' in case enum), but the richer tag enum lets us classify this as 'formatting_failure'. framework mismatch justified: case.framework is 'generic' because v1 case schema does not include 'prettier'; the tag enum does.
